name: GIGABYTE Z590 GAMING X ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200 - Intel Z590 Chipset - Supports DDR4-5333(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C - DisplayPort - 2.5GbE LAN
shortName: GIGABYTE Z590 GAMING X ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200 - Intel Z590
description: ATX gaming motherboard for Intel 10th gen with Z590 chipset and PCIe 4.0 support for high-speed storage.
